overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of a futuristic urban transportation terminal in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring luxury sports cars, modern glass architecture, and pedestrians. The camera explores the environment around Terminal B and C, examining vehicles and architectural details including a distinctive glass canopy walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic transportation terminal exterior with vehicle pickup area

agents.ego_description: walking along the terminal sidewalk approaching a parked red luxury sports car

entered.detail: modern glass and steel terminal structure with TERMINAL B signage
tall terminal building with TERMINAL C signage and distinctive architecture
large corporate billboard with DELAMAIN branding
sleek red luxury sports car parked at the curb
angled glass and metal canopy structure covering the walkway
industrial vent emitting white steam smoke near the terminal entrance

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a sunny day at a futuristic transportation terminal, with the camera walking along a concrete sidewalk toward a striking red luxury sports car. Modern glass terminal buildings rise in the background, featuring prominent signage for Terminal B and C, while a large corporate billboard displays the Delamain logo.

scene_state.functional_zone: terminal curb area with parked vehicles

events.description: pedestrian woman with red hair passes close to camera, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: circling around the red sports car to examine it from different angles

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire walking past the red car while looking at her phone

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the red sports car, examining its sleek design from multiple angles. A woman in business attire walks past the vehicle, briefly occluding the view as the camera continues to explore the terminal exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: terminal vehicle pickup lane with moving traffic

events.description: moving from sidewalk onto the road area following the silver sports car

agents.ego_description: following the silver sports car as it drives slowly along the terminal road

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving slowly along the terminal road

entered.detail: sleek silver luxury sedan with reflective chrome finish and tinted windows

segments.scene_description: Moving past the red car, the camera transitions to the road area and begins following a silver luxury sedan as it drives along the terminal pickup lane. The modern glass architecture of Terminal B remains visible on the left while steam rises from vents near the terminal entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated glass canopy walkway overlooking terminal

events.description: camera moves onto the glass canopy walkway, shifting view to look down through the reflective glass panels

agents.ego_description: walking along the glass canopy, looking down at the reflective glass panels and structural details

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions onto an elevated glass canopy walkway, looking down at the reflective glass panels and metal framework. The perspective shifts to show the terminal architecture from above, with the glass surface creating mirror-like reflections of the sky and surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: terminal exterior walkway with vehicle traffic below

events.description: returning to street level from the glass canopy, red sports car comes back into view

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk observing the terminal architecture and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: man in purple shirt and gray vest crossing the street in front of the silver car

entered.detail: red luxury sports car now seen from the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: Returning to street level, the camera walks along the terminal sidewalk where both the red and silver sports cars are now visible on the road. A pedestrian crosses in front of the silver car while the camera continues to explore the futuristic terminal environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic transportation terminal, transitioning from a close-up exploration of luxury vehicles to an elevated architectural perspective. It begins on a concrete sidewalk, gliding toward a striking red luxury sports car set against the backdrop of Terminal B and C and a corporate Delamain billboard. As the camera circles the sleek vehicle and a businesswoman walks past, the view shifts toward the road to follow a silver luxury sedan driving through a pickup lane where steam rises from nearby vents. The perspective then ascends onto an elevated glass canopy walkway, looking down at the reflective metal framework and mirror-like surfaces of the terminal architecture from above. Finally, the camera returns to street level, moving along the sidewalk to capture both luxury cars and crossing pedestrians within the expansive, modern environment.
